title: Wall Street's Next Tokenization Test: BlackRock-Backed Securitize's Market Debut
summary: Wall Street's Next Tokenization Test: BlackRock-Backed Securitize's Market Debut
briefing: Securitize expects to begin trading next week under the ticker symbol “SECZ,” following the completion of a merger with a blank-check firm.

title: Linux Foundation, Tech Giants Launch Akrites to Defend Open Source Against AI-Powered Attacks
summary: Linux Foundation, Tech Giants Launch Akrites to Defend Open Source Against AI-Powered Attacks
briefing: A coalition of 19 organizations—including every major AI lab and Wall Street banks—just built the security team that open-source maintainers never had.

title: Senators Demand Answers From CFTC Over Alleged Polymarket Deceptive Advertising
summary: Senators Demand Answers From CFTC Over Alleged Polymarket Deceptive Advertising
briefing: Senators are seeking answers from the CFTC about recent allegations of deceptive marketing from Polymarket.

title: OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.6—But Only for Some Users Due to Trump Admin
summary: OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.6—But Only for Some Users Due to Trump Admin
briefing: OpenAI introduced the GPT-5.6 family of AI models on Friday, but only limited users can access them for now thanks to the U.S. government.

title: Spanish Regulator Says No Extensions for EU Crypto Deadline as Binance Remains Unlicensed
summary: Spanish Regulator Says No Extensions for EU Crypto Deadline as Binance Remains Unlicensed
briefing: Crypto firms operating in the European Union will be forced to cease operations if they do not obtain a MiCA license by July 1.

title: This AI Agent Survived 6,000 Hack Attempts—Here’s How
summary: This AI Agent Survived 6,000 Hack Attempts—Here’s How
briefing: Fernando Irarrázaval posted his OpenClaw assistant's inbox to Hacker News and watched Claude Opus 4.6 hold off thousands of attackers.

title: Kalshi Scores FIFA World Cup Spotlight as Prediction Market Trading Surges to Record
summary: Kalshi Scores FIFA World Cup Spotlight as Prediction Market Trading Surges to Record
briefing: As prediction markets notch record trading volumes, Kalshi is ramping up its marketing push through a high-profile FIFA World Cup deal.

title: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Limit GPT-5.6 Rollout: Reports
summary: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Limit GPT-5.6 Rollout: Reports
briefing: The reported request to OpenAI follows the Trump administration's move to limit access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models.
